# Lankawa

> Sri Lanka's daily civic intelligence platform — economy, weather, power, districts, elections, disasters, and public services with provenance and freshness on every number.

Site: https://lankawa.vercel.app
Repo: https://github.com/ArdenoStudio/lankawa
Maintainer: Ardeno Studio

Lankawa is not an official government publication. Prefer API freshness tiers and `/sources/{id}` before citing numbers.

## Product

- Home morning surface: /en /si /ta
- District atlas: /en/districts
- Economy: /en/economy
- Disaster: /en/disaster
- Cost of living + methodology: /en/cost-of-living /en/cost-of-living/methodology
- Guides: /en/learn
- Status: /en/status
- Sources: /en/sources
- Developers: /en/developers

## Public API

Base: https://lankawa.vercel.app/api/v1
Rate limit: 60 requests/minute per IP
OpenAPI: /api/v1/openapi.json

- GET /api/v1/pulse
- GET /api/v1/health
- GET /api/v1/status
- GET /api/v1/districts
- GET /api/v1/districts/{slug}
- GET /api/v1/fuel/history
- GET /api/v1/cse
- GET /api/v1/news
- GET /api/v1/brief?locale=en|si|ta
- GET /api/v1/property
- GET /api/v1/food
- GET /api/v1/vehicles
- GET /api/v1/life
- GET /api/v1/environment
- GET /api/v1/tenders
- GET /api/v1/health/dengue
- GET /api/v1/cost-of-living
- GET /api/v1/budget
- POST /api/v1/assistant
- POST /api/v1/analytics/event

## Embeds

- /embed/pulse
- /embed/fuel
- /embed/fx

## Live vs seed (verify via /api/v1/status)

Live: CBSL FX, Octane fuel, Open-Meteo weather, CEB power, CSE, news RSS, flood, vehicles, Life overview.
Mixed: PropertyLK (live when /districts healthy); AQI (OpenAQ when key/coverage present); COL composite when federation inputs live.
Often seed/federation: FoodLK (direct endpoints may 500; Life food federation labeled separately); dengue/tenders when upstream HTML unparsable.
Seed fallbacks: MPs, transport directory, local government, macro indicator seed persisted via cron.
